prompt: Lead the development of a group-level responsible AI governance architecture for a multinational telecom operator deploying AI across network optimization, customer churn prediction, fraud detection, and content moderation, integrating EU AI Act risk classification requirements, local regulatory obligations across 14 jurisdictions, algorithmic audit procedures, cross-functional AI ethics review board protocols, and executive accountability structures, coordinated across AI research, legal, security, operations, and board-level governance.
